experiment: SIRI Perplexity Benchmark - Qwen3-0.6B Bubble Transformer

uniform_bonus.description: Same routing_bonus applied to all 28 layers
uniform_bonus.finding: PPL degradation is roughly linear in bonus. bonus<=0.5 keeps delta<5%.

entropy_weighted_bonus.description: bonus[layer] = base_bonus * entropy_ratio[layer] / avg_entropy_ratio. Collapsed layers (low entropy) get near-zero bonus; well-clustered layers get proportionally more.
entropy_weighted_bonus.finding: Entropy-weighted tuning cuts degradation ~50% at base_bonus=0.2-0.3. Best config: base_bonus=0.2 entropy-weighted = +0.90% PPL.

num_bubbles_sweep.description: Varying NUM_BUBBLES with entropy-weighted base_bonus=0.2. Tests whether cluster count affects PPL.
num_bubbles_sweep.finding: NUM_BUBBLES has negligible impact on PPL (16/32/64 all within 0.01%). The routing bonus magnitude matters far more than cluster granularity. 32 is a good default.

bubble_assignment_analysis.description: Per-layer clustering quality with 32 bubbles on 511 tokens

summary.interpretation: Average layer uses 17.6/32 bubbles, entropy ratio 0.52 (1.0=uniform, 0.0=single cluster)

bubble_assignment_analysis.finding: Deep layers (11-26) cluster well. Early shallow layers (2,4) collapse to 1-2 bubbles. Entropy-weighted bonus exploits this structure.

key_insights: 1. Bubble Transformer adds measurable clustering inductive bias at ~1% PPL cost (entropy-weighted bonus=0.2)
2. PPL degradation is roughly linear in uniform bonus: 0.1->+0.5%, 0.5->+3.7%, 1.0->+14.7%
3. Entropy-weighted tuning cuts degradation by ~50% at bonus=0.2-0.3 vs uniform
4. Deep layers (11-26) naturally cluster into 20-27/32 bubbles — centroids are learning structure
5. Shallow layers (2,4) collapse to 1-2 bubbles — centroids don't differentiate there
6. SOFT routing bias (additive) is viable; HARD block-sparse mask causes PPL explosion (>100k)
7. Best practical config: base_bonus=0.2 entropy-weighted = 25.95 PPL (+0.90% vs 25.72 baseline)
8. NUM_BUBBLES (16/32/64) has negligible impact on PPL — cluster granularity doesn't matter at this scale
failed_approaches: Weight copy/reshape: PPL 7M-11M (projections don't align after reshape)
Missing q_norm/k_norm: PPL 35,370 (Qwen3 requires QK normalization before RoPE)
Hard block-sparse mask: PPL 148k-327k (token isolation destroys context)
Bonus=2.0+: PPL 16,740 (routing bias overwhelms attention scores)
Full-sequence forward (no sliding window): OOM on 4GB VRAM
